placement_rules: Place as a normal Housing Tile. Vanguard only.
Place as a normal Housing Tile. Vanguard only.
benefit: Steward Power: Once per Season, on your turn, when you place a Travel Tile or Resource Tile, you may place it without spending an Action. All normal costs and requirements still apply.

benefit: Steward Power: Once per Season, on your turn, when you place a tile in a disconnected empty hex, you may ignore the Travel action required for that placement. All normal costs and placement requirements still apply.

benefit: Activated Effect: Move your Steward Token from this Stables to another placed Stables, or from a tile adjacent to this Stables to a tile adjacent to another placed Stables. The destination tile must not be Overstrained.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a River hex.
benefit: Passive: This tile contributes to the Travel Network. It connects its Travel Network to every other placed Docks that is adjacent to a River hex.
notes: River-adjacent Special Tile; not placed on River hexes unless future text explicitly permits it.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Social Tile.
benefit: Once per round, when any player places a tile adjacent to this tile, that tile costs 0 Resources. The tile must still satisfy all placement requirements and action costs.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Travel Tile.
benefit: Once per round, when any player places a tile adjacent to this tile, reduce that tile's cost by 1 resource of the group's choice. Cost reductions cannot reduce costs below 0.

benefit: Passive: While this tile is not Overstrained, Travel Tiles in this tile's Travel Network have Supported.
